positive: A minimalist, stylized portrait of a majestic forest creature (like an ethereal owl or a mythical fox) perched on a stylized branch. The composition should feature a dramatic, strong silhouette against a pastel, watercolor-washed background (shades of dusty blue, sage green, and burnt orange). The style must be geometric and clean, blending Art Deco symmetry with modern flat graphic design elements. Emphasis on clean lines, high contrast between the black silhouette and the background, and a limited, sophisticated color palette. Perfect for a central, apparel-ready print.
negative: blur, noise, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, disfigured, artifacts, grainy, messy, complex background, photography, realism
